title: Guard platform-channel calls per platform
description: A MethodChannel only works if the native side implements it, so check platform support and handle the missing case.
body: Use when calling native code over a MethodChannel/EventChannel. Do not assume the native handler exists on every platform the app runs on (iOS, Android, web, desktop). Actions: implement the handler on each supported native side, branch on Platform / defaultTargetPlatform or feature-detect before invoking, and catch MissingPluginException / PlatformException to degrade gracefully when a platform lacks the feature. Validation signals include a test (with a mock channel) that an unsupported platform path is handled rather than crashing, and that errors from native are surfaced. Risk boundary: an unguarded channel call throws MissingPluginException on a platform without the handler, crashing the feature; secrets or tokens passed over a channel cross into native logs, so avoid sending sensitive data unnecessarily.
